name: Thrakkar Stonehollow
sd_appearance: Dragonborn scholar, standing tall with dark obsidian scales, horns polished to a mirror sheen, and eyes holding ages-old wisdom. Wearing pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, and glass-lens goggles, his ink-stained hands and elbows bear the mark of countless hours spent poring over ancient texts. A staff rests on his shoulder, while multiple scroll cases hang from his belt. A distinctive visual detail: a quill made from a raven's feather, tucked behind his ear.
faction_visual: pale blue scholar robes, brass instrument clips, glass-lens goggles, ink-stained hands
style_note: ink-stained hands, reading lenses, reinforced elbows, multiple scroll cases
